commit.subject: LU-14947 tests: recovery-small test_26b to use proper mount
commit.message:
LU-14947 tests: recovery-small test_26b to use proper mount

Use proper mount point to create file on MDS

Test-Parameters: testlist=recovery-small env=ONLY=26,ONLY_REPEAT=10
Fixes: d027507b51 ("LU-14947 tests: recovery-small 26b to create file on MDT0")
Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I2cb290eb3f73241f7211f9e240cde7c29f788415
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60751
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
